title: cross-mirror run-log inventory for CCB HRD data

next_tickets.title: S16i: external DAQ run-log checksum join for HRD runs 1-65
next_tickets.body: Question: do DAQ-side logbooks or unmounted acquisition products contain independent trigger-mode, beam-state, and forced/random pedestal metadata for HRD runs 1-65? Join those external records to the S16g ROOT checksum manifest without changing waveform-derived labels. Expected information gain: separates true provenance metadata from filename/ROOT-header inference and decides whether direct forced/random pedestal closure is possible.
